_doc: Project-shared Claude Code settings for the Sly repo. Everyone who clones the repo and opens Claude Code gets these. Personal overrides live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Keep this file minimal — broad allowlists belong in personal settings; project-shared rules should reflect things everyone on the team should have.

SessionStart.command: if [ -f docs/prd/MARKETPLACES_STRATEGY.md ]; then echo '[sly] MARKETPLACES_STRATEGY.md is the canonical source for Epic 86-96 (marketplaces platform + identity-first amplifiers). Project-local agents available: epic-implementer, test-validator, frontend-designer — see .claude/agents/README.md.'; fi

_agentNotes: Project-local agents live in .claude/agents/. Invoke a top-level session with `claude --agent <name>` or use the agent type as a subagent_type in the Agent tool. The agents view (`claude agents`) lists background sessions started with `/bg`. See .claude/agents/README.md for invocation patterns and suggested fan-out.
